features.name: AI test generation
features.description: Claude generates pytest-bdd tests from Jira story AC via /test-generation skill + build_context.py

features.name: Test execution
features.description: Generated tests run via pytest; results parsed into structured report JSON

features.name: Traceability register
features.description: Append traceability records to register.json; render REGISTER.md after each run

features.name: Story-keyed trigger
features.description: Extract Jira story ID from commit message / PR title / branch name; skip if absent

features.name: Deploy gate
features.description: resolve_gate.py reads register.json and exits 0 (green) or 1 (red) to block/allow merge

features.name: Agentic CI loop
features.description: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1 runs /test-generation in CI with full TS/TSX/JS/JSX context

features.name: RCA in PR report
features.description: build_pr_body.py adds static RCA table + Haiku-generated plain-English root cause when tests fail
